question: What acount had our biggest expense This fiscal year to date?
gold_sql: select account, sum(debit) from master_txn_table as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name  where account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','+1 year', '+3 months', '-1 day') group by account order by sum(debit) desc limit 1
generated_sql:
SELECT account, SUM(debit) AS total_debit
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE transaction_date BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY account
ORDER BY total_debit DESC
LIMIT 1;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT account, SUM(debit) AS total_debit
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE transaction_date BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY account
ORDER BY total_debit DESC
LIMIT 1;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer Last fiscal year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months', '+1 years', '-1 days')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_last_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_current_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_last_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_current_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name

question: How much did Joan Ramos spend on Baby apparel and shoes in July during last year?
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Joan Ramos" and instr(account,"Baby apparel and shoes") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(T1.Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table AS T1 
JOIN employees AS T2 ON T1.businessID = T2.businessID 
JOIN products AS T3 ON T1.Product_Service = T3.Product_Service 
WHERE T2.Employee_name = 'Joan Ramos' 
  AND T3.Product_Service_type = 'Baby apparel and shoes' 
  AND T1.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','-1 day') 
  AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','+30 days','-1 day
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT SUM(T1.Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table AS T1 
JOIN employees AS T2 ON T1.businessID = T2.businessID 
JOIN products AS T3 ON T1.Product_Service = T3.Product_Service 
WHERE T2.Employee_name = 'Joan Ramos' 
  AND T3.Product_Service_type = 'Baby apparel and shoes' 
  AND T1.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','-1 day') 
  AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','+30 days','-1 day

question: Compare sales by customer Last year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days', 'start of year') AND date(current_date,  'start of year', '-1 days')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS last_year_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS current_year_sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS last_year_sales,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS current_year_sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name

question: How much did Tyler Brewer spend on golf instruction services in July during last year?
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Tyler Brewer" and instr(account,"golf instruction services") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')

SELECT SUM(Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
JOIN chart_of_accounts ON master_txn_table.businessID = chart_of_accounts.businessID 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Tyler Brewer' 
AND chart_of_accounts.Account_name = 'Golf Instruction Services' 
AND strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = strftime('%Y-%m', date('now', '-1 year', 'julian day')) 
AND strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = '2022-07';

question: Compare sales by customer in q1 this year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date, 'start of year', '+3 month', '-1 day')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year', '+1 month') AND date('now', 'start of year', '+3 month')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year', '+1 month') AND date('now', 'start of year', '+3 month')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: What acount had our biggest expense in may last year?
gold_sql: select account, sum(debit) from master_txn_table as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name  where account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+4 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+5 month', '-1 day') group by account order by sum(debit) desc limit 1
generated_sql:
SELECT Account, SUM(Amount) AS Total_Expense
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+5 month','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+5 month','+30 day','-1 day')
GROUP BY Account
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT Account, SUM(Amount) AS Total_Expense
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+5 month','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+5 month','+30 day','-1 day')
GROUP BY Account
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;
```<|im_end|>

question: What acount had our biggest expense in may last year?
gold_sql: select account, sum(debit) from master_txn_table as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name  where account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+4 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+5 month', '-1 day') group by account order by sum(debit) desc limit 1
generated_sql:
SELECT Account, SUM(Amount) AS Total_Expense
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+5 month','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+5 month','+30 day','-1 day')
GROUP BY Account
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT Account, SUM(Amount) AS Total_Expense
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+5 month','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+5 month','+30 day','-1 day')
GROUP BY Account
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;
```<|im_end|>

question: What was the first bill Jesus Snyder received from Roger Vega?

JOIN vendors v ON mt.Vendor = v.Vendor_name

ORDER BY mt.Transaction_DATE ASC
LIMIT 1;

question: Compare sales by customer today
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date) AND date(current_date)  group by customers

SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE = CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;

    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM

question: Compare sales by customer Last month
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "start of month", "-1 months") AND date( current_date, "start of month", "-1 days")  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_last_month
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 month','start of month') AND date('now','-1 month','end of month')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_last_month
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 month','start of month') AND date('now','-1 month','end of month')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer Last 12 months
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "-12 months", "start of month") AND date( current_date, 'start of month', '-1 day')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-12 months') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;

question: Compare sales by customer in aug this year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year', '+7 month') AND date(current_date, 'start of year', '+8 month', '-1 day')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year', '+1 month') AND date('now', 'start of year', '+2 month', '-1 day')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year', '+1 month') AND date('now', 'start of year', '+2 month', '-1 day')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer This week to date
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "weekday 0", "-7 days") AND date( current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS sales_this_week, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) - LAG(SUM(master_txn_table.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS sales_last_week
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days') AND date('now', 'weekday 0')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
raw_output:
```sql

    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS sales_this_week, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) - LAG(SUM(master_txn_table.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS sales_last_week
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name

question: Compare sales by customer This week to date
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "weekday 0", "-7 days") AND date( current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS sales_this_week, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) - LAG(SUM(master_txn_table.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS sales_last_week
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days') AND date('now', 'weekday 0')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name

question: Compare sales by customer Last fiscal year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months', '+1 years', '-1 days')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_last_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_current_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_last_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_current_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name

question: How many Grapefruit oil did we sell to Mr. Daniel Gentry This fiscal year?
gold_sql: select sum(quantity) from master_txn_table where customers = "Mr. Daniel Gentry" and product_service = 'Grapefruit oil' and transaction_type in ('invoice', 'sales receipt') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year', '+3 months') AND date(current_date)
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
JOIN products ON master_txn_table.Product_Service = products.Product_Service 
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Mr. Daniel Gentry' 
AND products.Product_Service = 'Grapefruit oil' 
AND strftime('%Y', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 month');
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT SUM(Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
JOIN products ON master_txn_table.Product_Service = products.Product_Service 
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Mr. Daniel Gentry' 
AND products.Product_Service = 'Grapefruit oil' 
AND strftime('%Y', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 month');
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer in may last year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+4 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+5 month', '-1 day')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_amount
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','+may','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','+may','+31 day')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    sales_amount DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_amount
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','+may','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','+may','+31 day')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    sales_amount DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer This month
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "start of month") AND date( current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer This week
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "weekday 0", "-7 days") AND date( current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days') AND date('now', 'weekday 0')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days') AND date('now', 'weekday 0')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: What acount had our biggest expense in q3 last year?
gold_sql: select account, sum(debit) from master_txn_table as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name  where account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+6 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+9 month', '-1 day') group by account order by sum(debit) desc limit 1
generated_sql:
SELECT Account, SUM(Amount) AS Total_Expense
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','-3 months') AND date('now','-1 year','-2 months')
  AND Transaction_TYPE = 'expense'
GROUP BY Account
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT Account, SUM(Amount) AS Total_Expense
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','-3 months') AND date('now','-1 year','-2 months')
  AND Transaction_TYPE = 'expense'
GROUP BY Account
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer This week to date
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "weekday 0", "-7 days") AND date( current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS sales_this_week, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) - LAG(SUM(master_txn_table.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS sales_last_week
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days') AND date('now', 'weekday 0')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS sales_this_week, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) - LAG(SUM(master_txn_table.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS sales_last_week
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days') AND date('now', 'weekday 0')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
```<|im_end|>

question: What was the total bill Shelby Simmons received from Stacey Hoffman?
gold_sql: select sum(credit) from master_txn_table where customers = "Shelby Simmons" and transaction_type = 'bill' and vendor = "Stacey Hoffman"
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
JOIN vendors ON master_txn_table.Vendor = vendors.Vendor_name 
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Shelby Simmons' AND vendors.Billing_address = 'Stacey Hoffman';
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT SUM(master_txn_table.Amount) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
JOIN vendors ON master_txn_table.Vendor = vendors.Vendor_name 
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Shelby Simmons' AND vendors.Billing_address = 'Stacey Hoffman';
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer YTD
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date) group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer Last fiscal year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months', '+1 years', '-1 days')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_last_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_current_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_last_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_current_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name

question: Compare sales by customer MTD
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "start of month") AND date( current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: What was the last bill Taylor Donaldson received from Jennifer Rush?

FROM master_txn_table mt
JOIN customers c ON mt.Customers = c.customer_name
JOIN employees e ON mt.businessID = e.businessID
WHERE e.Employee_name = 'Taylor Donaldson' AND c.customer_full_name = 'Jennifer Rush'
ORDER BY mt.Transaction_DATE DESC
LIMIT 1;

FROM master_txn_table mt
JOIN customers c ON mt.Customers = c.customer_name
JOIN employees e ON mt.businessID = e.businessID
WHERE e.Employee_name = 'Taylor Donaldson' AND c.customer_full_name = 'Jennifer Rush'
ORDER BY mt.Transaction_DATE DESC
LIMIT 1;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer This year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:

```<|im_end|>

question: How much did Joseph Thompson spend on Accounts Receivable (A/R) in July during last year?
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Joseph Thompson" and instr(account,"Accounts Receivable (A/R)") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')

FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
WHERE Employee_name = 'Joseph Thompson' 
  AND Transaction_TYPE = 'A/R' 
  AND Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 months','-1 day') 
                          AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+6 months','+30 days','-1 day');

JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE = CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer This fiscal year to date
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','+1 year', '+3 months', '-1 day')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS sales_this_year, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) - LAG(SUM(master_txn_table.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE)) AS sales_last_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
raw_output:
```sql

    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS sales_this_year, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) - LAG(SUM(master_txn_table.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY strftime('%Y', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE)) AS sales_last_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
```<|im_end|>

question: What acount had our biggest expense in q1 this year?
gold_sql: select account, sum(debit) from master_txn_table as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name  where account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date, 'start of year', '+3 month', '-1 day') group by account order by sum(debit) desc limit 1
generated_sql:
SELECT Account, SUM(Amount) AS Total_Expense
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year', '+1 month') AND date('now', 'start of year', '+3 month')
  AND Transaction_TYPE = 'expense'
GROUP BY Account
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT Account, SUM(Amount) AS Total_Expense
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year', '+1 month') AND date('now', 'start of year', '+3 month')
  AND Transaction_TYPE = 'expense'
GROUP BY Account
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer Last quarter
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date < strftime('%Y-%m-%d', strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') || '-' || substr('00' || (((strftime('%m', 'now') - 1) / 3) * 3 + 4), -2, 2) || '-01')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-3 months') AND date('now','-1 month')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-3 months') AND date('now','-1 month')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer in may last year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+4 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+5 month', '-1 day')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_amount
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','+may','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','+may','+31 day')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    sales_amount DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_amount
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','+may','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','+may','+31 day')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    sales_amount DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer This week
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "weekday 0", "-7 days") AND date( current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days') AND date('now', 'weekday 0')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days') AND date('now', 'weekday 0')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer This month to date
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "start of month") AND date( current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of month') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer in q1 this year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date, 'start of year', '+3 month', '-1 day')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year', '+1 month') AND date('now', 'start of year', '+3 month')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year', '+1 month') AND date('now', 'start of year', '+3 month')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "weekday 0", "-7 days") AND date( current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'weekday 0', '-7 days') AND date('now', 'weekday 0')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;

question: Compare sales by customer Last 12 months
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "-12 months", "start of month") AND date( current_date, 'start of month', '-1 day')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-12 months') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-12 months') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer This year to date
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_this_year, 
    SUM(m.Credit) - LAG(SUM(m.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY c.customer_name) AS sales_last_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    c.customer_name;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_this_year, 
    SUM(m.Credit) - LAG(SUM(m.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY c.customer_name) AS sales_last_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    c.customer_name;
```<|im_end|>

question: How much did Scott Hill spend on Installation in July during last year?

FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
JOIN chart_of_accounts ON master_txn_table.businessID = chart_of_accounts.businessID 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Scott Hill' 
AND chart_of_accounts.Account_name = 'Installation' 
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','start of month','+7 months','+30 days','-1 day');
raw_output:

question: When was the last time we sold attached and detached units
gold_sql: select transaction_date from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where account_type in ('Income','Other Income') and product_service = "attached and detached units" order by transaction_date desc limit 1
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN Product_Service_type = 'attached' THEN Transaction_DATE END) AS last_attached_sale,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Product_Service_type = 'detached' THEN Transaction_DATE END) AS last_detached_sale
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    products ON master_txn_table.Product_Service = products.Product_Service
WHERE 
    Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    MAX(CASE WHEN Product_Service_type = 'attached' THEN Transaction_DATE END) AS last_attached_sale,
    MAX(CASE WHEN Product_Service_type = 'detached' THEN Transaction_DATE END) AS last_detached_sale
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    products ON master_txn_table.Product_Service = products.Product_Service
WHERE

question: Compare sales by customer in dec last year
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+11 month') AND date(current_date, '-1 year', 'start of year', '+12 month', '-1 day')  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_amount
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','-1 month','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','-1 month','+30 days')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    sales_amount DESC;
raw_output:
```sql

    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_amount
FROM

    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name

GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    sales_amount DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer Last 30 days
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date( current_date, "-30 days") AND date( current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-30 days') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
raw_output:
```sql

    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS Total_Sales
FROM 
    master_txn_table

    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-30 days') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    Total_Sales DESC;
```<|im_end|>

question: What was the lowest bill Janice Martin received from Steven Hodges?

question: Compare sales by customer Last month

WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 month','start of month') AND date('now','-1 month','end of month')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name

question: What acount had our biggest expense in q2 this year?
gold_sql: select account, sum(debit) from master_txn_table as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name  where account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year','+3 month') AND date(current_date, 'start of year', '+6 month', '-1 day') group by account order by sum(debit) desc limit 1
generated_sql:
SELECT Account, SUM(Amount) AS Total_Expense
FROM master_txn_table
WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-3 months') AND date('now','-1 month')
GROUP BY Account
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;

FROM master_txn_table
WHERE Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-3 months') AND date('now','-1 month')
GROUP BY Account
ORDER BY Total_Expense DESC
LIMIT 1;
```<|im_end|>

question: Compare sales by customer This year to date
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, 'start of year') AND date(current_date)  group by customers
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_this_year, 
    SUM(m.Credit) - LAG(SUM(m.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY c.customer_name) AS sales_last_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    c.customer_name;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(m.Credit) AS sales_this_year, 
    SUM(m.Credit) - LAG(SUM(m.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY c.customer_name) AS sales_last_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of year') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    c.customer_name;
```<|im_end|>

SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS sales_this_quarter, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) - LAG(SUM(master_txn_table.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY quarter) AS sales_last_quarter
FROM

    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of quarter') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    quarter;
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT 
    customers.customer_name, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) AS sales_this_quarter, 
    SUM(master_txn_table.Credit) - LAG(SUM(master_txn_table.Credit)) OVER (ORDER BY quarter) AS sales_last_quarter
FROM 
    master_txn_table
JOIN 
    customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
WHERE 
    master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now', 'start of quarter') AND date('now')
GROUP BY 
    customers.customer_name
ORDER BY 
    quarter;
```<|im_end|>

question: How much revenue came through Emily Rivera Last fiscal year?
gold_sql: select sum(credit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where customers = ""Emily Rivera"" and account_type in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months', '+1 years', '-1 days')
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(Credit) AS Revenue
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Emily Rivera' 
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','+1 day');
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT SUM(Credit) AS Revenue
FROM master_txn_table
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Emily Rivera' 
AND master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE BETWEEN date('now','-1 year','-1 day') AND date('now','-1 year','+1 day');
```<|im_end|>

question: How much did Catherine Peterson spend on Uncategorized Income in July during last year?
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Catherine Peterson" and instr(account,"Uncategorized Income") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Catherine Peterson' 
AND master_txn_table.Account = 'Uncategorized Income' 
AND strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = strftime('%Y-%m', date('now', '-1 year'), 'start of month', '+7 months');
raw_output:
```sql
SELECT SUM(Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name 
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Catherine Peterson' 
AND master_txn_table.Account = 'Uncategorized Income' 
AND strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = strftime('%Y-%m', date('now', '-1 year'), 'start of month', '+7 months');
```<|im_end|>
